IdempotencyKey.description: Stable idempotency token for safe retries of POST, PUT, PATCH, and DELETE operations routed through the gateway. Replays are retained for 24h and surfaced through X-Idempotency-Replayed.
IdempotencyKey.name: Idempotency-Key

XApiVersion.description: Pinned additive contract version for the v1 public API release published with gateway QoS and hardening support.
XApiVersion.name: X-API-Version

XCorrelationId.description: Stable request correlation identifier reused by downstream authorization, orchestration, audit flows, and backfilled by the gateway when recovery requires it.
XCorrelationId.name: X-Correlation-Id

action.description: Canonical action identifier such as workspace.update or bucket.write.

DurationString.description: Compact duration string used by in-atelier lifecycle policies.

EntityMetadata.description: Non-secret additive metadata for canonical entities.

info.description: Console login, signup, activation, password recovery, and contextual authorization decisions. Generated from the unified public API contract for v1.
info.summary: Console login, signup, activation, password recovery, and contextual authorization decisions.
info.title: In Atelier Auth API

400.description: The decision request is malformed or contextually inconsistent.

403.description: The caller is authenticated but not authorized for the requested tenant/workspace action.

404.description: The tenant, workspace, or target resource was not found.

413.description: Gateway rejected the request because the body exceeded the configured size budget for this route family.

429.description: Gateway QoS policy rejected the request rate for this route family.

431.description: Gateway rejected one or more invalid or oversized request headers.

504.description: Gateway timed out while waiting for the downstream control-plane or adapter response.

post.summary: Resolve a contextual authorization decision under the auth family

200.description: Authentication evaluated and the current session envelope is returned.

403.description: The credentials are invalid or the account is not allowed to enter the console.

409.description: The account requires a non-happy-path status view such as activation or credential recovery.

413.description: Gateway rejected the request because the body exceeded the configured size budget for this route family.

429.description: Gateway QoS policy rejected the request rate for this route family.

431.description: Gateway rejected one or more invalid or oversized request headers.

504.description: Gateway timed out while waiting for the downstream identity or control-plane response.

post.summary: Authenticate a console operator with username/password and mint the SPA session envelope.

403.description: The caller is not authorized to terminate the requested session.

413.description: Gateway rejected the request because the body exceeded the configured size budget for this route family.

429.description: Gateway QoS policy rejected the request rate for this route family.

431.description: Gateway rejected one or more invalid or oversized request headers.

504.description: Gateway timed out while waiting for the downstream identity or control-plane response.

delete.summary: Invalidate an active console session and revoke its refresh lifecycle.

200.description: The session was refreshed and the rotated token set is returned.

403.description: The refresh token is invalid or no longer usable.

413.description: Gateway rejected the request because the body exceeded the configured size budget for this route family.

429.description: Gateway QoS policy rejected the request rate for this route family.

431.description: Gateway rejected one or more invalid or oversized request headers.

504.description: Gateway timed out while waiting for the downstream identity or control-plane response.

post.summary: Rotate the console access token set from a refresh token without replaying username/password.

202.description: The recovery request was accepted and normalized into a delivery-safe ticket envelope.

403.description: The caller cannot start password recovery for the requested account.

413.description: Gateway rejected the request because the body exceeded the configured size budget for this route family.

429.description: Gateway QoS policy rejected the request rate for this route family.

431.description: Gateway rejected one or more invalid or oversized request headers.

504.description: Gateway timed out while waiting for the downstream identity or control-plane response.

post.summary: Start password recovery for a console operator without leaking whether the account exists.

400.description: The password-reset confirmation payload is malformed.

403.description: The reset token is invalid or expired.

404.description: The recovery request was not found.

413.description: Gateway rejected the request because the body exceeded the configured size budget for this route family.

429.description: Gateway QoS policy rejected the request rate for this route family.

431.description: Gateway rejected one or more invalid or oversized request headers.

504.description: Gateway timed out while waiting for the downstream identity or control-plane response.

post.summary: Confirm a password-reset token and return the next status view for the console account.

202.description: The signup was accepted and normalized into a platform-user registration envelope.

403.description: The effective signup policy rejects self-service registration for this environment or plan.

409.description: The username or email already belongs to an existing platform user.

413.description: Gateway rejected the request because the body exceeded the configured size budget for this route family.

429.description: Gateway QoS policy rejected the request rate for this route family.

431.description: Gateway rejected one or more invalid or oversized request headers.

504.description: Gateway timed out while waiting for the downstream identity or control-plane response.

post.summary: Create a self-service console signup and return whether activation is automatic or pending approval.

200.description: The effective signup policy is returned.

403.description: The caller cannot inspect signup policy resolution.

429.description: Gateway QoS policy rejected the request rate for this route family.

431.description: Gateway rejected one or more invalid or oversized request headers.

504.description: Gateway timed out while waiting for the downstream identity or control-plane response.

get.summary: Resolve the effective self-service signup mode across global, environment, and plan overrides.

200.description: The normalized signup registration envelope is returned.

403.description: The caller cannot inspect the requested signup registration.

404.description: The signup registration was not found.

429.description: Gateway QoS policy rejected the request rate for this route family.

431.description: Gateway rejected one or more invalid or oversized request headers.

504.description: Gateway timed out while waiting for the downstream identity or control-plane response.

get.summary: Inspect the current signup registration status for pending activation, activation, or rejection messaging.

202.description: The activation decision was accepted, the initial tenant bootstrap was normalized, and owner/resource provisioning context can be tracked asynchronously.

400.description: The activation decision payload is malformed.

403.description: The caller is not authorized to approve or reject self-service signups.

404.description: The signup registration was not found.

413.description: Gateway rejected the request because the body exceeded the configured size budget for this route family.

429.description: Gateway QoS policy rejected the request rate for this route family.

431.description: Gateway rejected one or more invalid or oversized request headers.

504.description: Gateway timed out while waiting for the downstream identity or control-plane response.

post.summary: Approve or reject a pending self-service signup as a platform superadmin workflow.

403.description: The caller cannot inspect the requested status view.

404.description: The requested status view was not found.

429.description: Gateway QoS policy rejected the request rate for this route family.

431.description: Gateway rejected one or more invalid or oversized request headers.

504.description: Gateway timed out while waiting for the downstream identity or control-plane response.

get.summary: Resolve the canonical status-screen copy and next actions for console auth edge states.
